languages.text: "Разумный слуга {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бога-Императора{/g} среди расцветшей на Даргонусе ксеноереси — возможно ли?".

traits.locale_text: "Разумный слуга {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бога-Императора{/g} среди расцветшей на Даргонусе ксеноереси — возможно ли?".

languages.text: "A right-minded servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} amid the xenoheresy flourishing on Dargonus — could it be?"
languages.original_text: "Разумный слуга {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бога-Императора{/g} среди расцветшей на Даргонусе ксеноереси — возможно ли?".

"A right-minded servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} amid the xenoheresy flourishing on Dargonus — could it be?"

languages.text: “在异形异端泛滥的达戈努斯，竟还有一心向善的{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}忠仆？真是不可思议。”
languages.original_text: "A right-minded servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} amid the xenoheresy flourishing on Dargonus — could it be?"

traits.locale_text: “在异形异端泛滥的达戈努斯，竟还有一心向善的{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}忠仆？真是不可思议。”

languages.text: « {mf|Un serviteur sensé|Une servante sensée} de l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} au cœur de la xénohérésie qui prospère sur Dargonus... Serait-ce possible ? »
languages.original_text: "A right-minded servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} amid the xenoheresy flourishing on Dargonus — could it be?"

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Un serviteur sensé|Une servante sensée} de l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} au cœur de la xénohérésie qui prospère sur Dargonus... Serait-ce possible ? »

languages.text: "Dargonus'ta gelişen zeno kâfirliğinin ortasında doğru yolu bilen bir {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} hizmetkârı... Bu mümkün olabilir mi?"
languages.original_text: "A right-minded servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} amid the xenoheresy flourishing on Dargonus — could it be?"

traits.locale_text: "Dargonus'ta gelişen zeno kâfirliğinin ortasında doğru yolu bilen bir {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} hizmetkârı... Bu mümkün olabilir mi?"

languages.text: «¿Un{mf||a} sirviente just{mf|o|a} del {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} entre la xenoherejía que florece en Dargonus? ¿Es posible?».
languages.original_text: "A right-minded servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} amid the xenoheresy flourishing on Dargonus — could it be?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Un{mf||a} sirviente just{mf|o|a} del {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} entre la xenoherejía que florece en Dargonus? ¿Es posible?».

languages.text: "Ein vernünftiger Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperators{/g} inmitten der auf Dargonus blühenden Xeno-Ketzerei — kann das sein?"
languages.original_text: "A right-minded servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} amid the xenoheresy flourishing on Dargonus — could it be?"

traits.locale_text: "Ein vernünftiger Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperators{/g} inmitten der auf Dargonus blühenden Xeno-Ketzerei — kann das sein?"

languages.text: 「異教徒の異端がドラゴンヌスで盛んに広まっている中で、正気な{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}皇帝{/g}の臣下であるのかもしれない」
languages.original_text: "A right-minded servant of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} amid the xenoheresy flourishing on Dargonus — could it be?"
